title: Moundnaik Garage Storage Ladder Hook, 12 Pcs Heavy Duty Utility Hooks, 17cm Garden Tool Organization Hanger (Black + Red, 17cm x 17cm)
features: Versatile Storage Hooks: Excellent garage storage hook, you can use it to store ladder, shovel, hose, broom, power tools, bicycle, weed eater, garden tool, yard tool, sports equipment. Use it to say goodbye to the messy garage.

Wall Mounted Hanger: Heavy duty garage storage hangers create more space, you can wall mount these heavy duty garage storage hangers in the garage, shop, basement, shed, and utility room for efficient storage.
Utlity Hook Package: 12 pcs ladders hooks + 24 pcs Screws and 24 pcs Anchors are inside the utility hooks set. Outside wide: 17cm / Inside wide: 14cm, Outside long: 17cm / Inside long: 15.6cm
Heavy Duty Hook: Wall mount garage storage hooks are made of tubular steel(Φ=12mm), which is durable and sturdy, and it’s powder coated and rust resistant. holds up to 20kg.
Easy Installation: The heavy duty hooks are easy to install on various surfaces, including wood, drywall, and concrete. The strong steel body provides reliable support for your belongings.
description: 12 Pcs Garage Wall Hooks Heavy Duty, 17cm Garage Tool Storage, Garage Organizer Wall Mount,Tool Hangers for Organizing Power Tools, Ladder, Bike, Ropes, Helmet, Hoses. STURDY, DURABLE AND SAFE: The garage hooks are made of heavy duty 12mm tubular, have strong load bearing capacity, can hold weight up to 20kg. The hanger are not so easy to bend and will last for years. Packing Includes 12 x Ladders Storage Hooks 24 x Screws, Length: 4 cm 24 x Anchors, Length: 4 cm Size: Outside wide: 17cm, Inside wide: 14.2cm, Outside long: 17cm, Inside long: 15.6cm Installation Instructions: 1. Choose and mark the postion for installation. 2. Use the driller to drill hole on the wall according to the size of the expansion anchors. 3. Insert the drywall anchors into the hole and put the hook on the wall. 4. Use the screw driver to tighten the screws on the hook.end of installation. Screws and Anchors We can only provide the screws and anchors that meet the needs of most people, Only suitable for hardwood and common walls. When it comes to special walls, such as brick walls, cement walls, studs, and plasterboard walls,they require different screws and anchors, so we can't provide all types of screws and anchors. You need to prepare the necessary screws and anchors by yourself.
